error.no_results_found: No results found.  Try searching for a different area with the same schedule as yours or choose a different provider.
error.provider_error: Unable to reach Provider.  See Logs for details.
error.sepush_400: Bad request. If you have existing areas configured, they may have legacy v2 area IDs (containing hyphens). Remove and re-add those areas to get the correct v3 IDs.

lookup_areas.description: Search your area name, e.g. Milnerton, then select your area ID from the results.

invalid_area_ids.title: Load Shedding area IDs need to be updated
invalid_area_ids.description:
The following area(s) have legacy v2 area IDs (containing hyphens) that are no longer valid: **{areas}**.

SePush migrated from API v2 (hyphen IDs, e.g. `eskde-10-fourways`) to v3 (underscore IDs, e.g. `za_gt_jhb_fourways_4pef`).

To resolve this, go to **Settings → Integrations → Load Shedding**, open the integration options, remove the affected area(s), and re-add them by searching for the area name to get the correct v3 ID.
